privileged_info_summary: Verified that all task data is synthetically generated. The setup script explicitly creates a framework document detailing three pay grades ('Grade A - Senior' for $90,000-$140,000, 'Grade B - Mid-Level' for $60,000-$90,000, 'Grade C - Junior' for $40,000-$60,000) and maps them to three synthetically generated employees (James Anderson EMP001 at $105,000, Sarah Mitchell EMP002 at $75,000, David Nguyen EMP003 at $50,000) exactly as claimed in the metadata. The verifier.py strictly enforces these constraints and uses the specified 55 pass threshold.
